meaning: adj.螺旋形的,扭曲的,怪僻的,疯疯癫癫的
examples: Soon enough you'll realise how screwy this place is.
There are missing, necessary files on our desktop or there may have been a virus and now its all screwy.
You see, tax season is a little screwy this year, what with the delays and all.
Indeed, the largest part of household wealth is not being considered which is what makes the figures so screwy.
